projects.title: Hospital Management System
projects.description: Complete hospital administration application with patient management, appointments, medical staff and clinical history. MVC architecture with MongoDB persistence.
projects.longDescription: Final Degree Project implementing a comprehensive hospital management system. Includes modules for patient registration, appointment scheduling, medical staff management, electronic health records and report generation.

projects.title: Immersive Mobile App
projects.description: Modern Android application built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose, implementing MVVM architecture and Material 3 design.
projects.longDescription: Mobile development project exploring the latest Android technologies. Uses Jetpack Compose for declarative UI, ViewModel for state management, and Room for local persistence.

projects.title: ETL Pipeline with Airflow & AWS
projects.description: Data extraction, transformation and loading pipeline orchestrated with Apache Airflow and deployed on AWS with S3, Glue and Athena.
projects.longDescription: Data engineering solution for processing large volumes of information. Implements Airflow DAGs to orchestrate multi-source data ingestion, PySpark transformation, and data lake storage.

projects.title: REST API with FastAPI
projects.description: Modern high-performance backend built with FastAPI, including JWT authentication, automatic OpenAPI documentation and Pytest tests.
projects.longDescription: RESTful API following development best practices. Implements endpoints with Pydantic validation, token-based authentication, rate limiting, and automatically generated OpenAPI documentation.

projects.title: Power BI Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Interactive dashboard for visualizing business KPIs, connected to real-time data sources.
projects.longDescription: Business Intelligence solution presenting key business metrics. Includes interactive visualizations, dynamic filters, and automatic data refresh from multiple sources.

projects.title: Kafka Streaming System
projects.description: Real-time event processing platform using Apache Kafka for data stream ingestion and processing.
projects.longDescription: Data streaming architecture that processes events in real time. Implements Kafka producers and consumers, Kafka Streams processing, and time-series database storage.

projects.title: RPA Automation Bot
projects.description: Robotic process automation for repetitive tasks using UiPath: web scraping, data entry and automated reporting.
projects.longDescription: Robotic automation solution that reduces manual work in business processes. Includes web data extraction, document processing, and automatic report generation.

projects.title: Data Warehouse with Snowflake & DBT
projects.description: Modern data warehouse architecture using Snowflake as storage and DBT for reproducible transformations.
projects.longDescription: Analytical data warehouse implementation following best practices. Uses DBT to create documented and tested data models, with staging, marts and metrics layers.
